title: Raw event record (v5.4.0 pipeline stage 1 output)
description: The output of a source translator: one normalized, source-specific raw event, BEFORE debtor-party resolution. This is the input to the debtor party engine (knowledge_base/architecture/17_debtor_party_rules.md). Doc-type normalization (Build Mode Protocol 02.3 stage 2) has already run, so canonical_doc_type is populated; the debtor identity has NOT yet been resolved. A PRIMARY_EVENT_SOURCE raw event originates a lead (13_lead_origination_contract.md 13.2); an ENRICHMENT_SOURCE raw event never does.

raw_event_id.description: Unique id for this raw event record. Stable across runs for the same source row.

source_id.description: Source identifier, matching a sources.<id> key in config/counties/<county_slug>.json.

source_role.description: Source role per 16_source_of_record_matrix.md 16.E. Only PRIMARY_EVENT_SOURCE originates a lead.

raw_doc_type.description: The document-type code as the source published it, before normalization. Audit field.

canonical_doc_type.description: The doc type after county-taxonomy normalization (17_debtor_party_rules.md 17.A canonical_doc_type). Keys the 17.C debtor_party_rules lookup and the 18.B aggregation key.

instrument_number.description: Recording instrument / document number. Required field (may be null when the source row carries none); the 18.E union-by-instrument dedup keys off this.

recorded_date.description: Date the instrument was recorded. Required field (may be null). 18.C earliest/latest_recorded_date derive from this.

event_date.description: The underlying event date when distinct from the recording date (e.g. sale date, filing date).

source_url.description: Verbatim deep link to the source record (or a valid offline path). Mandatory per Build Mode Protocol 02.4 — never templated, never fabricated.

parties.description: Structured, name-type-tagged parties carried in the source row. The debtor party engine uses these for structured-field doc types (17.C). May be empty for doc types whose debtor is extracted from document_body_text.

name.description: Party name as it appears in the source row.

name_type.description: Party role code. 17.C defines TP (taxpayer), DF (defendant), GR (grantor), GE (grantee). PL (plaintiff) and OTHER are added by this contract because 17.C names plaintiff filers without giving them a name_type code — see contract finding F-2.

raw_role.description: The party-role label as the source published it, before mapping to name_type. Audit field.

document_body_text.description: Full document text. Required input for the doc types whose 17.C expected_debtor is 'extracted from document body' (foreclosure_notice, trustee_sale, probate, affidavit_of_heirship). Null for structured-field doc types.

property_refs.description: Property identifiers carried in the source row. parcel_id may be null when the source does not link to a parcel; the lead is still emitted UNRESOLVED per 13_lead_origination_contract.md 13.14.

parcel_id.description: County-canonical parcel identifier, when the source carries one.

situs_address.description: Property situs address, when carried in the source row or document body.

case_number.description: Court case number, for court-sourced events.

amounts.description: Monetary amounts carried in the source row (lien amount, judgment amount, etc.).

evidence_ids.description: Evidence ledger entry ids backing this raw event (see evidence_ledger_entry.schema.json).

captured_at.description: When the underlying source row was collected.
